title: How to choose payroll & payout stack in Kenya (2026 buyer guide)
excerpt: A 2026 buyer guide for choosing a payroll and payout stack in Kenya — a weighted evaluation matrix across nine criteria, three worked SME profiles, a full RFP question list, and a verification rule that keeps the comparison fair. Decision-support, not a vendor ranking; not legal or tax advice.
meta_title: Payroll & payout stack Kenya 2026 — buyer guide with scoring matrix
meta_description: A structured 2026 buyer guide for Kenyan payroll & payout software: a weighted matrix across 9 criteria, worked SME profiles, RFP question list, verification rule.
